CheckTitle: Okta password policies require symbol characters
Description: **Okta Password Policy symbol complexity** should require at least one symbol in every active policy.
Risk: **Missing symbol complexity requirements** reduce password entropy and can leave users assigned to weaker active policies easier to guess or brute-force.

Code.Other: Security > Authentication > Password: edit each active password policy and adjust password settings to the STIG requirement.

Recommendation.Text: **Require at least one symbol character in every active Okta Password Policy** and ensure legacy policies do not bypass this control.
